title: premna longiacuminata
intro: Premna longiacuminata, also known as Long-Stalk Premna or Thai Premna, is a plant species in the mint family (Lamiaceae) that is native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, headaches, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Premna longiacuminata has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing blood pressure, preventing oxidative stress, and exhibiting antimicrobial and antifungal activities. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
